narrative: Deposits kept flowing: 8,726 PRL entered the bridge across 20 mints in 24h against one 47 PRL redemption, lifting custody to a new high of 771,308 PRL even as price slid -7.38% to $0.484 on $27k DEX volume. unMineable — one of the largest multi-coin mining services — added PRL support, the second external mining venue after MinePRL. Network hashrate rebounded +17.8% to 30.63 EH/s, and the core repo added 8 stars (225) with 33 commits across the four tracked repos in 7 days. One month in, the catalog stands at 12 shipped projects.

market.prl_circulating_supply_method: block_height × current_block_reward (constant-subsidy approximation — Pearl is in month 1, before the first halving)
sources: api.dexscreener.com/latest/dex/search?q=WPRL (filtered chainId==ethereum, baseToken==0x07696DcaB55E62cfef953666b29Fe1970518cB00 — multichain "Perle" tokens sharing the PRL ticker excluded)
pool.mineprl.com/v1/public/summary (network.height, network.block_reward_prl for circulating supply approximation)

network.active_workers_scope: MinePRL pool only — network-wide miner count is not exposed by Pearl RPC
sources: pool.mineprl.com/v1/public/summary (network.network_hashrate_hps, network.height, network.chain_nbits, economics.active_gpus, economics.network_share) — pool snapshot generated 2026-06-12T23:59:51Z

anomalies: Custody surplus widened to 12,764 PRL (1.68%) from 5,862: the 8,726 PRL deposited over the last 24h queues through the 24-hour slow-mint delay before WPRL issuance, so custody leads minted supply while the queue settles. Verified across two relay reads; both supply counters agree exactly. Expected to converge as pending mints clear.
Strong inbound day: 20 mints totaling 8,726 PRL against one 47 PRL redemption — custody reached a new high of 771,308 PRL.
Fast-lane usage reads 0% because this snapshot is taken moments after the daily 00:00 UTC window reset; the live Stats page shows intraday usage.
Network hashrate +17.8% to 30.63 EH/s; MinePRL pool reports 19 active GPUs (14 in the prior snapshot).

social.summary: unMineable, one of the largest multi-coin mining services, announced PRL (PearlPow) support with flexible payout assets — the day's most concrete development. Mining-economics content discussed rising difficulty as more miners join, and Pearl continued to appear in proof-of-useful-work project roundups. Note: a separate "Perle" token (also ticker PRL, on BSC/Solana) ran a Binance Wallet Alpha trading competition — unrelated to Pearl Network and excluded from this summary.

sample_tweets.snippet: Mining $PRL and getting paid directly in $USDT? Or $BTC, $DOGE, $ETH… Get maximum flexibility from your PearlPow gains!
Pearl ($PRL) Profitability Dropping! If your daily $PRL earnings are dipping, here is exactly why: rising mining difficulty…
2 of the absolute largest TAMs. Store-of-Value assets. Assets that represent AI ownership. @prlnet

sources: api.x.com/2/tweets/search/recent + /2/tweets/counts/recent (query: (@prlnet OR @pearlbridgexyz OR "$PRL") -is:retweet lang:en, last 24h — count includes unrelated "PRL" acronym noise and the separate Perle (PRL) token)

github.last_commit_msg: v0.4.3: fix multi-model re-audit findings C1-C8

ecosystem.name: PearlBridge
ecosystem.description: Non-custodial PRL ↔ WPRL bridge between Pearl L1 and Ethereum.

ecosystem.name: PearlWallet
ecosystem.description: Open-source non-custodial browser wallet for Pearl L1 and WPRL with native bridge integration.

ecosystem.name: Pearl Explorer
ecosystem.description: Block explorer for the Pearl network mainnet.

ecosystem.name: MinePRL Pool
ecosystem.description: Mining pool for PRL — the canonical community pool.

ecosystem.name: Pearl Research
ecosystem.description: Pearl L1 project homepage — research, docs, and ecosystem index.

ecosystem.name: Pearl Compute
ecosystem.description: Compute marketplace front-end linked from the Pearl L1 site.

ecosystem.name: Pearl Polymath
ecosystem.description: Community / research site linked from pearlresearch.ai.

ecosystem.name: Pearl AI on Hugging Face
ecosystem.description: Pearl AI organization on Hugging Face (models / research artifacts).

ecosystem.name: Pearl Discord (joinpearl)
ecosystem.description: Pearl community Discord — primary chat for builders and miners.

ecosystem.name: @prlnet on X
ecosystem.description: Pearl network account on X — release / status updates.

ecosystem.name: Nockchain
ecosystem.description: AI compute chain that began merge-mining Pearl on 2026-06-10 — miners earn PRL and NOCK from the same proof-of-useful-work attempt.

ecosystem.name: unMineable (PRL)
ecosystem.description: Multi-coin mining service that added PRL (PearlPow) support — miners earn PRL and get paid out in BTC, ETH, DOGE, USDT and other assets.
